backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a per-user radio station favorites store using a Principal-keyed Map, with addFavorite, removeFavorite, and getFavorites endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell loading Doto, Orbitron, and Share Tech Mono fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating radio playback, search, favorites, theme, and a RAF loop that reads AnalyserNode amplitude to drive the radar widget.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: App header component rendering the Squadron Radio logo/title, an audio-reactive RadarWidget, and tabbed navigation between Stations and Saved views with a search toggle button.
Canvas component that renders 16 frequency bars from a Web Audio AnalyserNode in phosphor green/amber, falling back to a dim idle line when inactive.
frontend/src/components/BottomToolbar.ts: Persistent bottom toolbar providing volume control, play/pause/stop buttons, a dark/light theme toggle, and a meatball menu popover with Share and About actions.
frontend/src/components/HUDLayout.tsx: Minimal pass-through layout wrapper that applies a dark OKLCH background color with all decorative HUD effects removed.
Displays the currently playing radio station's name, status label (ON AIR, TUNING, etc.), country, bitrate, and an audio visualizer, with visual states driven by playback and stream health props.
frontend/src/components/RadarWidget.tsx: Renders an animated canvas-based radar sweep widget whose speed and brightness react to playback state and audio amplitude, with blips shown during active playback.
frontend/src/components/SearchPanel.tsx: Provides a search UI with name input, genre tag quick-select buttons, and a country autocomplete dropdown, triggering onSearch callbacks on interaction or Enter key.
frontend/src/components/StationList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of radio stations with play indicators, favicon, favorite toggle, and loading/empty states, supporting both RadioStation API objects and backend Station types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functions, status flags, and identity persistence via AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and removing favorite stations from the ICP backend actor, plus a helper to convert RadioStation API objects to the backend Station type.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadioPlayer.ts: Custom React hook managing radio playback state including play/pause/stop, volume, stream health monitoring, auto-retry logic (up to 3 attempts with exponential backoff), Web Audio API analyser node setup, and last-station persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom React hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the selection to localStorage, and toggles the 'light' CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a military HUD color palette (dark and light modes), and utility classes for HUD-styled text, panels, and station rows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/services/radioBrowserApi.ts: Service module providing typed async functions to interact with the Radio Browser API, including fetching top stations, searching by tag/country/name, listing countries and tags, and registering station clicks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens (HUD palette, sidebar, chart colors), custom fonts (Orbitron, Doto, Share Tech Mono), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for accordion and blink effects.
project_state.json: Project state metadata document describing the app as a military cockpit-themed radio player, listing architectural decisions, existing features, and known issues at schema version 9.
